essence: Inspects scaffolding installations to ensure structural integrity and compliance with safety standards.

identity.title: Scaffolding Inspector
identity.summary: Conducts regular inspections, issues reports, and advises on remedial actions to keep scaffolding safe for workers and the public.

salary.notes: Inspectors with certification and experience on large projects command higher rates.

qualifications: Scaffolding inspection certification (e.g., CISRS) or equivalent
Experience in scaffolding erection and safety standards
Strong attention to detail and report writing
Ability to work at height and in varied site conditions

lifestyle.description: Site‑based inspections with travel between projects; requires methodical checks and clear reporting.

habits: Performs scaffold inspections and documents findings
Advises on remedial actions and compliance
Coordinates with site managers and contractors
